recommendation: Create a simple monthly KPI dashboard to track net revenue, orders, average order value, discounts, and units sold.
Prioritize Outerwear in stock planning and product visibility, while monitoring dependency on this category.
Ensure Winter Jacket remains consistently available and visible across the strongest channels.
Protect the top-selling products, but test ways to grow secondary products to reduce revenue concentration risk.
Do not increase discounts automatically. First compare margin, order volume, and average order value between discounted and non-discounted orders.
Review why Physical Store performs well and consider prioritizing it in future campaigns.
Review sales activity in 2025-04 and 2025-06 to identify possible drivers of stronger and weaker performance.
Consider targeted campaigns or local offers for customers in Glasgow.
Keep all major payment methods available, since customer payment behavior is not concentrated in a single option.
